insights: Record order book of ~₹53,000 cr (>25 GW), skewed toward exports and the US market.
Solar cell manufacturing ramped past 5.4 GW; backward integration into ingot-wafer under way.
1.6 GW Texas (USA) module plant operational and being scaled to reduce tariff exposure.
guidance: Module capacity guided to ~21 GW and cell capacity toward ~11 GW by FY27.
EBITDA margin expected to stay in the low-20s% as cell integration offsets module price pressure.
Capex funded largely from IPO proceeds and internal accruals; net-cash balance sheet maintained.
waaree-energies.orderExecution: Management expects the current order book to execute over roughly 8–10 quarters (FY27–FY28), weighted to H2 as US and cell capacity ramps.

insights: Order book of ~₹13,700 cr (≈9.4 GW) with a rising share of external (merchant) cell sales.
Fully integrated cell + module capacity; TOPCon transition largely complete.
Non-China equipment sourcing cited as an edge for US-bound DCR supply.
guidance: Targeting cell capacity expansion toward ~10 GW over FY27–FY28.
Guided to sustain high-20s% EBITDA margin on the integrated cell advantage.
premier-energies.orderExecution: Order book expected to convert over ~6–8 quarters, front-loaded as new TOPCon cell lines stabilise.
